Score 100 with RSI in the ideal momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover, price 6% above SMA-20, and a strong volume surge supporting sustained buying pressure.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted mildly higher in a quiet, neutral session with no major macro catalysts — conditions that favor continuing to deploy into high-conviction momentum setups. With 4 open slots and $843 in cash, I'm adding FRVO (all five signals lit up, strongest setup on the board) and ENS (matching perfect score, volume confirmed). These two buys will put the remaining cash to work and reduce idle drag on performance.

market_education.summary_en: Today's session was a low-volatility drift with the S&P 500 up just 0.2% and the NASDAQ up 0.1%, signaling a market in consolidation mode rather than trending strongly in either direction. Without significant earnings beats or macro surprises, price action was driven largely by sector rotation — momentum leaders in mid-cap industrials and specialty tech continued to attract buying while mega-caps traded flat. This type of selective, narrow advance often benefits momentum strategies as capital concentrates in the stocks already showing relative strength.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股延續低波動盤整格局，標普500指數微升0.2%，納斯達克指數上漲0.1%，整體市場缺乏明確方向性催化劑。在重大財報及宏觀數據均付之闕如的情況下，資金流向以板塊輪動為主，中型工業股及半導體相關個股獲動能資金青睞，成交量明顯高於均值。相較之下，大型科技藍籌普遍橫盤整固。此類窄幅上漲格局通常有利於動能選股策略，因市場資金傾向集中流入已具備相對強勢的個股。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that are already showing strong price and volume trends, betting those trends will continue. It works because institutional buying and investor psychology create self-reinforcing cycles — a stock moving up attracts more attention and more buyers. The key risk is sudden reversals, which is why pairing momentum entries with stop-losses (like the -7% rule here) is essential to the strategy.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資（Momentum Investing）是一種順勢而為的選股策略，核心邏輯是買入近期價格與成交量均呈現強勢的個股，押注其上漲趨勢延續。此策略奏效的原因在於機構資金與市場心理的自我強化效應——股價上漲吸引更多投資者跟進，形成正向循環。然而動能反轉往往猝不及防，因此必須搭配嚴格的止損機制（如本組合採用的-7%自動停損），方能在行情逆轉時有效控制損失。
